remaining_tasks.name: Entities tab — default view
remaining_tasks.note: DB empty — project deleted and needs test entities

blockers.description: DB is empty — user deleted .recall/recall.lbdb to recover from WAL corruption caused by killed recall init process
blockers.workaround: Add test entities via: python3 -c "import asyncio,sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from src.storage.selector import GraphSelector; from src.graph.service import GraphService; from src.models import GraphScope; svc=GraphService(); pr=GraphSelector.find_project_root(); asyncio.run(svc.add('Test entity about project architecture and LadybugDB graph backend', scope=GraphScope.PROJECT, project_root=pr))"

blockers.description: session_start.py hook runs GitIndexer with no timeout — holds DB in write mode for 30+ minutes, blocking UI server and all concurrent access
blockers.workaround: Kill any running 'recall init' processes before starting recall ui. Fix: wrap _run_sync() with multiprocessing timeout (4.5s as per CLAUDE.md design intent)

human_actions_pending.action: Add test entities with correct project_root before running recall ui
human_actions_pending.context: DB was deleted. Entities must be added via GraphSelector.find_project_root() (not Path('.')) so group_id='graphiti-knowledge-graph' matches the UI query. Use the script in the blocker workaround field, or wait for recall init to index some git history.

human_actions_pending.action: Run recall ui and complete the 4 UAT tests in 19-UAT.md
human_actions_pending.context: All 4 tests are pending. Test 1 (default view), Test 2 (retention filter), Test 3 (node rings), Test 4 (legend)

decisions.decision: Open LadybugDB in read_only=True + throw_on_wal_replay_failure=False from UI server
decisions.rationale: UI server only reads data. Exclusive write lock held by indexer was blocking all UI queries. read_only allows concurrent access.

decisions.decision: UI server routes already declared read-only in invariant docstring — formalized by passing read_only=True to GraphService
decisions.rationale: The routes.py docstring already declared read-only intent, we just enforced it at the DB level

next_action: Add test entities using the script in blockers.workaround, then run recall ui and complete UAT tests 1-4
context_notes: Phase 19 code is fully implemented and all 41 tests pass. The UAT smoke test is blocked by DB infrastructure issues. Two bugfixes were committed this session (read_only mode for UI server). The session_start.py timeout bug needs a separate fix phase. After UAT passes, run /gsd:complete-milestone.
